arts.ttl: Liverpool, Chelsea and Man United all chase £74.5m Leipzig defender
arts.sum: Liverpool, Chelsea and Manchester United are all interested in RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba, though face competition from Real Madrid. The 22-year-old is on the radar of the Premier League trio ahead of the summer transfer window. arts.sum: On top of that, Jamie Carragher accused Erling Haaland of deliberately skipping the Real Madrid game out of fear of facing Antonio Rudiger . Haaland remains a fitness doubt for Sunday’s visit of Liverpool, a crucial game in City' season.

arts.sum: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez has attracted a lot of criticism for his performances since joining the club and the Reds have now been urged to replace him with Alexander Isak.
